response.justification: Bogdan possesses a highly relevant and rare background in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning perfectly with the core mandate of this AI-driven engineering role. He also brings proven experience in high-throughput distributed systems and Staff-level technical leadership. While his complete lack of Python experience is a significant gap against the 'must-have' requirements, his polyglot nature and deep expertise in agentic workflows make him a strong candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Recent and highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated technical strategy and leadership through Staff-level roles, organizing dojos, and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: No mention of Python experience, which is explicitly listed as a must-have skill for the role.
Heavy reliance on Node.js and TypeScript for recent backend work, which may require adaptation to a Python-heavy stack.
His most relevant high-throughput distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby) was several years ago using DLang.
